A '''battle''' occurred in the [[Chorax system/Legends|Chorax system]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]] when [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Uwlla Iillor]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] ambushed the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] unit [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], using the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] [[Corusca Rainbow|''Black Asp'']] to pull the [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Prelude==
In [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], after Rogue Squadron was reformed, they were pulled out of hyperspace while en-route to a new base on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Talasea]], in the [[Morobe system]].<ref name="Rogue Squadron" />

==The battle==
The battle began when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruiser]] [[Corusca Rainbow|''Black Asp'']], commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Uwlla Iillor]], ambushed the [[Baudo-class star yacht|''Baudo''-class yacht]] ''[[Pulsar Skate]]'' in the [[Chorax system/Legends|Chorax system]]. The ''Black Asp'' took [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]-affiliated [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Mirax Terrik Horn|Mirax Terrik]] by surprise using an in-system [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jump, and activated its [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projectors]] before Terrik could escape. A full squadron of [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptors]] were then launched to overtake the modified [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]].<ref name="Rogue Squadron" />

Fortunately for Terrik, [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] had plotted a course through the Chorax system to their new base on [[Talasea]], and were pulled out of hyperspace by the ''Black Asp''. The Rogues outfought the Imperial starfighters and knocked out the ''Black Asp''{{'s}} forward [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]], forcing the Interdictor to withdraw. Rogue pilot [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn's]] [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] was disabled by an [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] shot from the ''Black Asp'', but he managed to restore partial power and shot down two Interceptors using targeting data provided by [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu's]] [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] ''[[Forbidden]]''.<ref name="Rogue Squadron" />

==Aftermath==
In all, seven TIE Interceptors were shot down, while the Rogues suffered no losses. Horn's X-wing was carried to Talasea by the ''Pulsar Skate''.<ref name="Rogue Squadron" />

==Behind the scenes==
The battle first appeared in the [[1996]] novel ''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'', written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]].<ref name="Rogue Squadron" />
